ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the API resource */,
  "resource_uri" TEXT /* URI of the API resource */,
  "http_method" TEXT /* HTTP method(s) supported by the API resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API resource was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the API resource */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the API resource */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the API resource */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the API resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API resource the description belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the description was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_descriptions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API resource the subscription belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed to the API resource */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the subscription */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription expires */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_subscriptions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_subscription_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the change belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_subscription_history_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES api_subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_notifications_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES api_subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator, subscriber) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API resource being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the API resource */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the API resource was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the API resource was used */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the API usage */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during API usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API resource being monitored */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the API resource */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of the API resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was collected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was last updated */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Number of requests made to the API resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_performance_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API resource being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the API resource */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was collected */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Analytics data for the API resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was collected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_analytics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_resource_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API resource being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API resource being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_comments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES api_resources ("resource_id")
)
